title: Add test coverage for social/posting.py (LinkedIn/Bluesky posting client)
description: social/posting.py is 1065 lines and handles all LinkedIn and Bluesky API calls — the final step of the social pipeline — but has zero test coverage. Posting failures are silent until the pipeline runs live. Critical functions like upload_linkedin_document, post_to_linkedin, and post_to_bluesky should be unit tested with mocked HTTP calls.
requirements: tests/test_posting.py exists with at least 6 tests
Test happy path for LinkedIn text post and Bluesky post
Test error handling when API returns non-200 response
No real network calls — all HTTP mocked with unittest.mock
done_criteria: Coverage of at least the public post/upload functions
context: social/posting.py contains PostingClient class. Uses requests library for HTTP. LinkedIn uses OAuth token from env. Bluesky uses ATP protocol. No existing tests for this module.
